title: eriostemon mollis
intro: Eriostemon mollis, also known as the Fraser's ru, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eriostemon mollis include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as an antiseptic to aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried for use in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
